prompt: Avatar icon on pure black background. A cute 'unicrab' character - a small crab face with a unicorn horn. The design: a round/wide crab face seen from the front, two large round eyes (bright green with darker green pupils), a small happy expression, a single pointed unicorn horn sticking up from the center top of the head, and two small crab pincers/claws on the left and right sides. The style is kawaii/cute but minimal - simple shapes, not too detailed. MONOCHROME GREEN ONLY - use different shades and brightness levels of green (from dark forest green to bright neon green to near-white green) for depth and contrast. NO other colors. Black background. The character should fill most of the square frame. Designed to be recognizable even at 32x32 pixels - so big shapes, clear silhouette, high contrast between elements. Think: emoji-level simplicity. This is an AI assistant's avatar for an AR glasses HUD display.
